developers.name: GIGA-42
developers.description: GIGA-42 is the joint venture between Scale42 and Global Interconnection Group (GIG) — pairing Scale42's data-centre development capability with GIG's energy-sector relationships and capital. One platform, from the substation to the rack.

developers.name: Norsk Datakraft AS
developers.description: Norsk Datakraft operates in data infrastructure, data processing, hosting, and related cloud services.
